findings: README documents swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl locations but not required schema/fields for telemetry contract.
swarm-state.json example sets task_id to commander id, conflicting with requirement to record claimed task_id.
child-agents.jsonl examples omit launch_requested event shape despite requirement to log it before each child launch.
Telemetry fields use mixed terminology (started vs launched) between launch_proof and telemetry counters.
README mentions nested progress but not swarm-state heartbeat/updated_at requirements.
